summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is explicitly a mixed inventory shard. Hydrated open PRs are kept independent for maintainer review; refs with unavailable live state are blocked for targeted human/later rehydration.

actions.reason: Useful standalone UI localization PR; no closure, merge, or shared canonical action is justified in plan mode.
Standalone docs/tooling lint PR; keep for normal maintainer review.
Substantive daemon/gateway fix with author follow-up status; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Feature/auth-provider PR needs proof and maintainer review; security-shaped labels alone were not classified as a true security report by preflight.
Substantive message-delivery bug fix; keep for maintainer review.
Standalone PR with proof/check blockers; keep independent rather than close or merge.
Standalone Codex behavior PR; keep for maintainer review.
Partial feature PR with a distinct scope; keep independent.
Focused channel bug fix; keep for maintainer review.
Focused gateway/session-state fix; keep independent.
Standalone memory runtime compatibility fix; keep independent.
Focused Codex PR with proof blocker; keep independent.
Small standalone config fix; keep independent due inventory scope and incomplete check hydration.
Useful standalone contributor PR with conflicts/author status; keep independent.
Draft standalone PR; keep independent rather than close.
Broad feature PR with conflicts and failing checks; keep independent for separate maintainer decision.
Standalone feature/refactor PR with proof and conflict blockers; keep independent.
Narrow standalone PR with proof blocker; keep independent.
